# state: invalid id silently ignored; agent falls through to fresh session with no warning or error
# scrub: user@host → user@machine ; home path → /home/user ; account email → example@website.com
# note: --resume accepts optional chatId; both UUID and garbage-string invalid ids produce identical silent fallback

# --- interactive TUI form: agent --resume=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 --yolo ---
# (no error, no warning — fresh session starts immediately)

user@machine:~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness $ agent --resume=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 --yolo

  v2026.06.19-20-24-33-653a7fb

  ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness

# --- headless confirmation: agent --resume=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 --print --yolo "test" ---
# (also silent fallback to fresh session; responds to prompt normally)
I'm here and working. What would you like to test or work on?

# --- headless confirmation: agent --resume=not-a-real-session --print --yolo "test" ---
# (garbage non-UUID id: identical silent fallback; no error)
I'm here and working. What would you like to do?
